dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Manage your SEO pipelines, monitor site performance, and track content updates.
dashboard.apiError: Is the API server running on port 8000?
dashboard.emptyDesc: Add a {file} file to the project root to get started.
dashboard.tip1: Go to Pipelines and select a site
dashboard.tip2: Choose New Post to generate your first AI blog post
dashboard.tip3: Use Update Posts weekly to improve underperforming content
dashboard.tip4: Run Diagnose for a deep SEO audit with Core Web Vitals

sites.title: Sites
sites.subtitle: All configured sites found in project root YAML files.
sites.infoBoxBefore: Sites are stored as YAML files in the project root (e.g.
sites.infoBoxAfter: to create one through the wizard, or copy
sites.emptyDesc: No config files found in the project root.
sites.removeConfirm:
Remove "{name}" from the engine?

This deletes the config.{id}.yaml file.

pipelines.title: Pipelines
pipelines.subtitle: Select a site, choose a mode, and watch the live output.
pipelines.keywordsDefault: Defaults to seeds from config if empty.

new.label: New Post
new.desc: Create a new AI-generated blog post with images

update.label: Update Posts
update.desc: Rewrite underperforming posts based on GSC data

full.label: Full Pipeline
full.desc: New posts + updates + static pages in one run

static.label: Static Pages
static.desc: Rewrite home, registration, and other static pages

recover.label: Recover
recover.desc: Restore pages that lost rankings after updates

diagnose.label: Diagnose
diagnose.desc: Deep SEO audit: indexing, CWV, cannibalization

impact.label: Impact Report
impact.desc: Measure GSC before/after impact of recent updates

images.label: Generate Images
images.desc: Add desktop + mobile images to posts missing them

products.label: Products
products.desc: Rewrite product pages + apply branded images

restore_titles.label: Restore Titles
restore_titles.desc: Restore original URL slugs from update history

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Google Search Console performance data for your sites.

notConfigured.title: Google Search Console not configured
notConfigured.desc: Add a {code} block to this site's YAML config (credentials_file, site_url) and run the pipeline once to authorize.

notAuthenticated.title: GSC not authorized yet
notAuthenticated.desc: Click Connect GSC to open the Google authorization page in your browser. Your token will be saved locally and this will only be needed once.

history.title: Update History
history.subtitle: Track all content updates and their outcomes.
history.empty: No history yet — run an Update pipeline to see records here.

posts.title: Posts
posts.subtitle: Browse published content from your platform.
posts.empty: No posts found for this site.

products.title: Products
products.subtitle: Browse products from your store (WooCommerce / Shopify).
products.empty: No products found. This feature is available for WooCommerce and Shopify sites.

credentials.platformNote: Platform cannot be changed after creation. To switch platforms, create a new site.

seoProtection.protectedPagesHint: One URL per line. These pages are NEVER rewritten by any pipeline run, regardless of their GSC data or ranking.
seoProtection.gscEnabledSubtitle: Protect high-performing pages using live traffic data
seoProtection.credentialsHint: Path to the .json file from Google Cloud Console, relative to the project root.
seoProtection.gscSiteUrlHint: Exactly as it appears in Search Console. Leave blank to auto-derive from domain.
seoProtection.thresholdsHint: These values define how the pipeline classifies each page before deciding whether to update it.
seoProtection.page2Desc: pos 11–30, impr. ≥ 20 — highest priority (push to page 1)
seoProtection.ctrOpportunityDesc: pos ≤ 10, CTR < 3% — meta description update only, body untouched
seoProtection.notIndexedDesc: no GSC data — full rewrite OK

content.seedKeywordsHint: One keyword per line. Expanded via Google Autocomplete and Trends.
content.competitorsHint: One URL per line. Analyzed to improve your content.
content.brandVoiceHint: Describe your brand tone and target audience. Injected into every AI prompt.
content.imageStyleSubtitle: Used by Imagen to generate post featured images.
content.uspHint: One per line. Referenced in content to build E-E-A-T and differentiate from competitors.

platform.title: Choose Your Platform
platform.subtitle: Select where your content will be published. You can change this later by editing the config file.
platform.allSupported: All platforms are fully supported. Choose the one that matches your site. You can change this later by editing the config file.

desc.wordpress: Publish via WordPress REST API. Uses application passwords — no OAuth needed.
desc.woocommerce: Optimize WooCommerce product pages using the WooCommerce REST API.
desc.shopify: Publish to Shopify blog and optimize product descriptions via Admin API.
desc.wix: Publish to Wix blog and stores using the Wix Headless CMS API.
desc.mongodb: For users of the blog-poster open source CMS — a headless blog engine for React, Vue, and Next.js websites. Requires MongoDB Atlas + Supabase for image storage.

siteInfo.title: Site Info & AI Settings
siteInfo.subtitle: Configure your site details and choose an AI provider.
siteInfo.aiProviderSubtitle: Choose any provider — use your own API key.
siteInfo.modelHint: Or type any model ID above after selecting
siteInfo.imageModelHint: Used to generate post featured images

credentials.title: Platform Credentials
credentials.subtitle: Connect the SEO engine to your {platform} instance.
credentials.mongodbUriHint: Find this in MongoDB Atlas → Connect → Drivers
credentials.wordpressNote: Generate an application password in WordPress Admin → Users → Edit your profile → Application Passwords. Requires WordPress 5.6 or later.
credentials.woocommerceNote: Generate keys in WooCommerce → Settings → Advanced → REST API → Add key (Read/Write permissions).
credentials.shopifyNote: Create a custom app in Shopify Admin → Apps → Develop apps. Enable write access for Articles and Products.
credentials.wixSiteIdHint: Found in your Wix dashboard URL: manage.wix.com/dashboard/SITE-ID/home
credentials.wixNote: Wix connection will be verified on the first pipeline run. API key must have Blog and Stores permissions.
credentials.supabaseSubtitle: Generated images are stored in Supabase Storage.

gsc.title: Google Search Console
gsc.subtitle: Optional but highly recommended. GSC data drives smart update decisions — which posts to rewrite, which to protect, and how to recover lost rankings.
gsc.enableSubtitle: Unlocks smart post ranking, CTR protection, and recovery features
gsc.credentialsHint: Path to the .json file from Google Cloud Console, relative to the project root. The token file (gsc_token.json) is auto-created after first login.
gsc.gscSiteUrlHint: Exactly as it appears in Search Console. Leave blank to auto-derive from domain.
gsc.thresholdsHint: Posts meeting these thresholds are treated as top performers and skipped from rewrites to avoid ranking drops.
gsc.setupTitle: How to set up OAuth credentials
gsc.laterNote: You can set up GSC later by editing the config file directly.

content.title: Content Settings
content.subtitle: All fields are optional — they help the AI write content that matches your brand and target keywords. You can update these any time by editing the config file.
content.seedKeywordsHint: One keyword per line. The engine expands these via Google Autocomplete and Trends.
content.competitorsHint: One URL per line. The engine analyzes competitor content to improve your posts.
content.brandVoiceHint: Describe your brand tone and target audience. Injected into every AI prompt.
content.imageStyleSubtitle: Used by Imagen to generate post images
content.uspHint: One USP per line. Referenced in content to build E-E-A-T and differentiate from competitors.

review.title: Review & Save
review.subtitle: Everything looks good? Click "Save Site" to create {file} in the project root.
review.name: Name
